Container.Name: lama-sidecar
Container.Overview: Full-resolution LaMa inpainting sidecar for CHUB's CL2K "retexting" feature. Exposes POST /api/v1/inpaint (the contract CHUB's lama_sidecar provider calls) and GET /health. CPU-only. On first run it downloads the big-lama model (~200MB, MD5-verified) into /models and caches it there. The image runs as non-root (99:100 / nobody:users) by default.

Config.Name: Model cache
Config.Description: Persists the downloaded big-lama model so it isn't re-fetched on restart

Config.Name: Region target res
Config.Description: Per-region downscale long-edge for background reconstruction. Large masked areas (logos) are inpainted at this scale so they recover texture instead of blurring; small text stays at native resolution. Set 0 to disable and run one full-resolution pass (pre-1.3 behaviour).

Config.Name: Region padding
Config.Description: Context padding around each masked region as a fraction of its size. Larger values give the inpainter more surrounding context and merge nearby text into one region.
